# P1 Gpu role daemon-only snapshot generated by:
#   cargo test -p nixling-host --lib gpu_argv::tests::daemon_input_snapshot_line -- --nocapture
# Source: packages/nixling-host/src/gpu_argv.rs::tests::daemon_input()
#
# Pins for the parity gate (tests/gpu-argv-shape.sh):
#   - argv[0..3]: <crosvm> device gpu
#   - --socket /run/nixling/vms/<vm>/gpu.sock (broker-prepared absolute path)
#   - --wayland-sock /run/nixling-gpu/<vm>/wayland-0 (in-sandbox bind target;
#     broker mounts /run/user/<uid>/wayland-0 → /run/nixling-gpu/<vm>/wayland-0
#     before runner start)
#   - --params cross-domain Wayland: context-types virgl:virgl2:cross-domain,
#     one hidden display, egl=true, vulkan=true
# Replaces the per-VM `nixling-<vm>-gpu.service` runner shape today.
/nix/store/AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA-crosvm-127.0/bin/crosvm device gpu --socket /run/nixling/vms/corp-vm/gpu.sock --wayland-sock /run/nixling-gpu/corp-vm/wayland-0 --params {"context-types":"virgl:virgl2:cross-domain","displays":[{"hidden":true}],"egl":true,"vulkan":true}
